attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.CALENDAR_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.CALENDAR_TYPE, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B,
(
select CALENDAR_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B
minus
select CALENDAR_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B
) ACM
where 
 ACM.CALENDAR_ID = STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.CALENDAR_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_JTF_CALENDARS_B)
